summary: 404 URL Security Fix - All 46 tests PASSED. Verified that invalid/spam URLs return HTTP 404, valid public routes return 200, auth and portal routes return 200, WordPress/attack paths return 404, 404 page has noindex meta and 'Page Not Found' text, valid pages have React app div#root. Login flow works correctly.

issues: PostHog and Cloudflare Insights scripts blocked by CSP - not critical but may affect analytics

critical_code_review_comments: server.js: Express catch-all route properly proxies to backend for route validation
route_validator.py: BLOCKED_SUBSTRINGS and BLOCKED_EXTENSIONS cover WordPress, config files, db admin, server probes
route_validator.py: VALID_STATIC_ROUTES whitelist includes all public pages
route_validator.py: NOT_FOUND_HTML has noindex,nofollow meta and does NOT include React app
server.py: serve_frontend_with_seo validates routes before serving index.html
server.py: block_malicious_paths middleware provides fast first-line defense
context_for_next_testing_agent: 404 URL security fix fully tested and working. The fix replaced CRA dev server with custom Express server (server.js) that proxies page requests to FastAPI backend for route validation. Invalid URLs return 404 with branded page and noindex meta. Valid routes return 200 with React app. All WordPress/attack paths blocked.

features_tested.404_page_content: PASS - Contains 'Page Not Found', noindex meta, no React root
features_tested.login_flow: PASS - Admin login with admin@suitsindia.com / admin works, redirects to /admin/dashboard
